content.en:
"Plotz, let's stop!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said.

"It's like fighting!"

Plotz's temper was already short-tempered, and now that the Calamity Australopithecus is here, he naturally wants to beat the Golden God Department fiercely.

Thundered!!!

The ancient demon-level beings on both sides were killed, and they fought frantically, and the Calamity Ancient Ape was too powerful, and it forcibly defeated several top ancient demon-level existences of the Golden God Department.

Just as the killing was more serious, a wisp of breath came across the ultimate void, causing both sides to stop.

"Ancient demon-level existences are not allowed to do anything!"

The breath came with the sound, and then vanished.

And whether it is the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon or Plotz, they will no longer do it.

The other Ancient Demon Levels also stopped one after another, and they didn't dare to do it at all.

"Whose breath was that just now?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

He guessed that it should be an ultimate supreme master of the main department of the mother of Aluo, and only in this way would the existence of the peak ancient demon level be frightened and dare not make a move.

If the existence of the ancient demon level does not move, it does not mean that they will withdraw, and the emperor and king level are still fighting.

And knowing that the existence of the ancient demon level did not make a move, many tribes directly turned against the water and besieged the Golden God Department in turn, and some tribes who were waiting and watching immediately joined the war.

Equally.

Ye Tian also participated in the war on behalf of the Eagle Department, but he did not show too terrifying strength, only killing the existence of the king level, almost killing in seconds and killing in seconds.

"Retreat!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon shouted.

The current situation is too unfavorable for the Golden God Department, and this time only one-third of the emperor and king levels have been brought out, after all, the main combat power depends on the existence of the ancient demon level.

Now, the ancient demon level can't fight, and can only rely on the emperor level and the king level, so this place is not suitable for them as the main battlefield.

Soon.

The Golden God Department retreated, and the Dragonspur Tribe did not continue to pursue and kill.

In this way, this battle ended briefly, but it was definitely not the real end, and there would definitely be a big battle in the future.

After the Golden God Department retreated, the Dragon Shadow, Dragon Shu and other ancient demon levels were excited, in fact, they were still very panicked before, until Pleoz said that there was a helper, they were relieved.

Of course.

Calamity Australopithecus is only here to help Plotz, not all the time, he has his own territory.

Soon, the Calamity Ancient Ape left, after all, now the ancient demon level is not allowed to participate, and he does not dare to disobey, there is no point in staying here.

And Pleoz also went to cultivate, and he was not needed for the rest of the matter, and the things he commanded could be handled by the dragon shadow.

......

Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian came back and informed He Lao of the information about this battle.

"He Lao, the Golden God Department has temporarily retreated!"

Ye Tian said.

"The Dragonshire Tribe actually repelled the Golden God Tribe?"

He Lao was very shocked, in fact, he had already made a plan, that is, the Dragon Disciple Tribe was defeated, and the Eagle Department was destroyed by the Golden God Department.

But now the result made him excited, and in this way, they had a hope of survival.

This also proves that Ye Tian's choice is not wrong.

Soon after, the alliance of the dragon tribe and the golden god tribe started a war in the place of Qinghuan Abyss, and the two sides agreed to let the emperor-level and king-level enter the battlefield, and the war time was 10,000 ancient demon eras, if anyone wins, then they can grasp the sovereignty of this territory, and the other party must leave here.

For this.

Pleoz and the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon have signed an agreement.

Immediately afterwards, the dragon disciple tribe issued a large number of resource rewards to attract emperors and kings to enter the Qinghuan Abyss to fight and kill.

And Ye Tian also looked at the conditions given by the Dragon Disciple Tribe, it was indeed very tempting, through the battle record, he could exchange all kinds of resource treasures, and even the treasures that even the ancient demon-level existence needed.

Some of the treasures should have been taken out by Plotz, and the Dragonsman tribe would definitely not be able to take them.

That's right, it's the ultimate Gujian fragment that makes Haru crazy, but it's a pity that Haru came out of the seal, and there is a high probability that he won't give him the ultimate Gujian fragment.

Because Harus was rescued by Plotz, it was not he who rescued him, so naturally there was no need to give him the Ultimate Gujian Fragment according to the agreement.

And Ye Tian didn't look for Haru anymore.

Now, seeing the Ultimate Gujian Fragment, he suddenly became a little interested, but if he wants to exchange the Ultimate Gujian Fragment, he needs too many battle records, and he is afraid that he will have to turn the tide of the battle before he can hope to get enough records to exchange for the Ultimate Gujian Fragment.

Ye Tian must have participated, but he was ready to break through to become an emperor before participating in this war.

He didn't go to war, and He Lao didn't go to war, but there were still a few elders in the Eagle Department who were excited about the reward, and they had lived too long and were ready to fight.

In this regard, Ye Tian and He Lao did not stop them and let them go.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian began to practice in retreat, using the resources he had obtained in the Dragon Swallow Pond to improve his physical body, and gradually elevated his cultivation to the limit realm of the king.

In the blink of an eye, several years of the Ancient Demon Era have passed.

During this period of time, the Dragon Disciple Tribe and the Golden God Department have suffered their own losses, causing many kings and emperors to fall, but they have also made several emperors rise in countless killings and have the title of emperor-level invincible.

And Ye Tian was still cultivating at the moment.

"'~ I have finally cultivated to the extreme of the king level, and I can hit the emperor level!"

Ye Tian's heart moved, the bottleneck was broken, the physical body began to reorganize, the ultimate body of ten thousand laws was completed, and the ultimate will was greatly improved.

Countless resources were swallowed by him, countless ultimate particle energy was absorbed by him, and his body began to transform wildly, and the life pattern has now been perfected a lot, and his current Ten Thousand Law Ultimate Body is far more powerful than the original Ten Thousand Ends Body.

After a long time, Ye Tian's physical body was transformed (King Qian's).

"I didn't expect that in this era, I broke through to the emperor level comparable to the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord, and my physical body has far surpassed that of my previous life, and even approached the physical body of the Ultimate Extreme Realm!"

His current physical strength is almost one-third of the power of the Ultimate Supreme Body, and his current use of the Ultimate Rule is far more than before, and he is about to comprehend the rudiments of the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Coupled with the change of life patterns, his physical body is very hard, and it is not easy to break his physical body.

Of course, he can continue to improve among the emperor level, and if he is promoted to the limit of the emperor level, he will almost be very close to the ultimate supreme body.

And during this time, he once again created a top-notch ultimate arcane art, the Dapeng Technique!

With the Dapeng Technique, his speed is extremely terrifying, faster than the ultimate arcane art of Nian Instant, and there are many changes, and the improvement of combat power is far from comparable to Nian Instant.
